name: APPLIED INDUSTRIAL TECHNOLOGIES INC
summary: PART I . In this Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended June30, 2025 (this "Annual Report"), Applied refers to Applied Industrial Technologies, Inc., an Ohio corporation. References to we, us, our, and the Company refer to Applied and its subsidiaries. Headquartered in Cleveland, Ohio, Applied and its predecessor companies have engaged in business since 1923. The fiscal year end for Applied is June30, 2025. We are a leading distributor and technical solutions provider of industrial...
